commitStrategyReview.notes: ATOMIC UNITS: Final glob-driven partitioning for 100% material coverage.

units.purpose: Move implemented and legacy plans to the archive directory.

messagePreview.header: chore(repo): archive completed and legacy plans
summary: Clean up the active plans directory
Update theme-governance manifest and commit-map metadata

subject.target: core theme logic and global tokens

units.purpose: Unify global tokens and interlude logic.

messagePreview.header: refactor(theme): abstract core theme logic and global tokens
summary: Implement global demo utility styles in '_demos.scss'
Update layout and page data logic for generic theme consumption

subject.target: event section themes and clean up legacy scss

units.purpose: Migrate specific styles to centralized section themes.

messagePreview.header: refactor(theme): unify event section themes and clean up legacy scss
summary: Migrate demo-specific styles to centralized section themes
Decouple section themes from event-specific prefixes
Remove redundant legacy SCSS files from events directory

messagePreview.header: refactor(theme): normalize landing theme tokens and presets
summary: Remove '--landing-' prefix from all landing theme presets
Standardize RGB color channel logic in theme presets
Normalize tokens in mapping files for generic consumption

subject.target: landing visuals by updating structural tokens

units.purpose: Relink structural files to generic tokens.

messagePreview.header: fix(theme): restore landing visuals by updating structural tokens
summary: Rename legacy '--landing-' variables in structural SCSS files
Restore connection between theme presets and component styles
Verify visual restoration after theme unification
